00028 #ifndef JELATINE_CLASSFILE_H
00029 #   define JELATINE_CLASSFILE_H (1)
00030 
00031 #include "wrappers.h"
00032 
00033 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00034 #   include <zzip/lib.h>
00035 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00036 
00037 #include "util.h"
00038 
00039 /******************************************************************************
00040  * Classpath interface                                                        *
00041  ******************************************************************************/
00042 
00043 extern void classpath_init( void );
00044 extern void classpath_teardown( void );
00045 
00046 /******************************************************************************
00047  * Class file type definitions                                                *
00048  ******************************************************************************/
00049 
00052 enum primitive_type_t {
00053     PT_BYTE, 
00054     PT_BOOL, 
00055     PT_CHAR, 
00056     PT_SHORT, 
00057     PT_INT, 
00058     PT_FLOAT, 
00059     PT_LONG, 
00060     PT_DOUBLE, 
00061     PT_REFERENCE, 
00062     PT_VOID 
00063 };
00064 
00066 typedef enum primitive_type_t primitive_type_t;
00067 
00073 enum const_pool_type_t {
00074     CONSTANT_Utf8 = 1, 
00075     CONSTANT_Integer = 3, 
00076     CONSTANT_Float = 4, 
00077     CONSTANT_Long = 5, 
00078     CONSTANT_Double = 6, 
00079     CONSTANT_Class = 7, 
00080     CONSTANT_String = 8, 
00081     CONSTANT_Fieldref = 9, 
00082     CONSTANT_Methodref = 10, 
00083     CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref = 11, 
00084     CONSTANT_NameAndType = 12, 
00085     // The following constants are internal to the VM and not seen in a file
00086     CONSTANT_Class_resolved = 13, 
00087     CONSTANT_Fieldref_resolved = 14, 
00088     CONSTANT_Methodref_resolved = 15, 
00089     CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref_resolved = 2 
00090 };
00091 
00093 typedef enum const_pool_type_t const_pool_type_t;
00094 
00097 enum access_flags_t {
00098     ACC_PUBLIC = 0x0001, 
00099     ACC_PRIVATE = 0x0002, 
00100     ACC_PROTECTED = 0x0004, 
00101     ACC_STATIC = 0x0008, 
00102     ACC_FINAL = 0x0010, 
00103     ACC_SYNCHRONIZED = 0x0020, 
00104     ACC_SUPER = 0x0020, 
00105     ACC_VOLATILE = 0x0040, 
00106     ACC_TRANSIENT = 0x0080, 
00107     ACC_NATIVE = 0x0100, 
00108     ACC_INTERFACE = 0x0200, 
00109     ACC_ABSTRACT = 0x0400, 
00110     ACC_STRICT = 0x0800, 
00111     // Internal flags for classes
00112     ACC_ARRAY = 0x1000, 
00113     ACC_HAS_FINALIZER = 0x2000, 
00114     // Internal flags for methods
00115     ACC_LINKED = 0x1000, 
00116     ACC_MAIN = 0x2000 
00117 };
00118 
00120 typedef enum access_flags_t access_flags_t;
00121 
00123 #define CLASS_ACC_FLAGS_MASK \
00124     (ACC_PUBLIC | ACC_FINAL | ACC_SUPER | ACC_INTERFACE | ACC_ABSTRACT)
00125 
00126 #define FIELD_ACC_FLAGS_MASK \
00127     (ACC_PUBLIC | ACC_PRIVATE | ACC_PROTECTED | ACC_STATIC | ACC_FINAL | \
00128     ACC_VOLATILE | ACC_TRANSIENT)
00129 
00130 #define METHOD_ACC_FLAGS_MASK \
00131     (ACC_PUBLIC | ACC_PRIVATE | ACC_PROTECTED | ACC_STATIC | ACC_FINAL | \
00132     ACC_SYNCHRONIZED | ACC_NATIVE | ACC_ABSTRACT | ACC_STRICT)
00133 
00138 struct class_file_t {
00139     union {
00140         FILE *plain; 
00141 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00142         ZZIP_FILE *compressed; 
00143 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00144     } file; 
00145 
00146     bool jar; 
00147 };
00148 
00150 typedef struct class_file_t class_file_t;
00151 
00152 /******************************************************************************
00153  * Class file interface                                                       *
00154  ******************************************************************************/
00155 
00156 extern class_file_t *cf_open(const char *);
00157 extern void cf_close(class_file_t *);
00158 extern uint8_t cf_load_u1(class_file_t *);
00159 extern uint16_t cf_load_u2(class_file_t *);
00160 extern uint32_t cf_load_u4(class_file_t *);
00161 extern void cf_seek(class_file_t *, long, int);
00162 extern long cf_tell(class_file_t *);
00163 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00164 extern ZZIP_FILE *jar_get_resource(const char *);
00165 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00166 
00167 /******************************************************************************
00168  * Class file components                                                      *
00169  ******************************************************************************/
00170 
00173 struct field_info_t {
00174     uint16_t access_flags; 
00175     const char *name; 
00176     const char *descriptor; 
00177 };
00178 
00180 typedef struct field_info_t field_info_t;
00181 
00184 struct field_attributes_t {
00185     bool constant_value_found; 
00186     uint16_t constant_value_index; 
00187 };
00188 
00190 typedef struct field_attributes_t field_attributes_t;
00191 
00194 struct method_attributes_t {
00195     bool code_found; 
00196     uint16_t max_stack; 
00197     uint16_t max_locals; 
00198     uint16_t code_length; 
00199     long code_offset; 
00200     bool exceptions_found; 
00201     uint16_t exception_table_length; 
00202 };
00203 
00205 typedef struct method_attributes_t method_attributes_t;
00206 
00207 #endif // !JELATINE_CLASSFILE_H
